title: Modernizing Legacy Data for Global Banks
summary: A technical review of migrating monolithic data to scalable cloud-native architectures.

sections.content: A technical review of migrating monolithic data to scalable cloud-native architectures.
Our phased approach minimized downtime while transitioning from legacy systems to modern cloud infrastructure.
